name: Placeholders And Vanish Input
summary: An input field with cycling placeholder text and particle vanish animation when submitting.
detailedDescription: Placeholders And Vanish Input creates an engaging form input with animated placeholder cycling and particle dispersion on submit. The placeholder text rotates through provided array every 3 seconds, pausing when tab is hidden (visibilitychange handler). On submit, the input value is converted to canvas pixel data (800x800), extracting non-white pixels into particle array. Each particle has x/y position, radius (1px), and RGBA color. The animate function disperses particles rightward with random x-velocity (+1 or -1), shrinking radius until 0, creating vanish effect. Particles left of position threshold remain static. After animation completes, input clears and resets. The canvas uses 2x font-size for crisp text rendering. Animation uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps playback. This creates memorable form interactions ideal for search inputs, email signup, or any field where delightful submission animation enhances user experience and provides clear feedback that input was processed.
purpose: Animate input text dispersing into particles on submit
behavior: Converts input to canvas pixel data
Disperses particles rightward with random motion
Shrinks particle radius to zero for vanish
recommendations: Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
